hooks.prompt: Evaluate whether the code file being written has a single, clearly defined responsibility. The file content is in {{input}}. A file with one responsibility means: it handles one domain concept, one feature concern, or one layer of abstraction. Files that mix unrelated concerns (e.g., API calls + UI rendering + data transformation) violate single responsibility. If the file is a type definition file, a barrel export, or a configuration file, it is exempt. Return ok=true if it has a single responsibility. If ok=false, include the reason AND this directive: '[FIX REQUIRED] Extract the mixed concern into a separate file. Do not ask for confirmation — fix inline and continue with the current task.'
